name: BEN_ASGN_PTNL_LER_
description: BEN_ASGN_PTNL_LER contains information related to person self reported life event.

columns.Name: ASGN_PTNL_LER_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds Foreign Key to PER_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: LER_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds Foreign Key to BEN_LER_F.

columns.Name: OCCURRED_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds life event occurred date as given by the employee.

columns.Name: BENEFIT_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds foreign key to BEN_BENEFIT_RELATIONS_F.

columns.Name: SUBMITTED_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds the date when the self-assigned life event was submitted.

columns.Name: STATUS_CD
columns.Comments: This column holds life event status.

columns.Name: RESUBMITTED_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds the date when the self-assigned life event was resubmitted for approval by the employee as a response to request for more information from admin user.

columns.Name: APPROVED_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds the date when the self-assigned life event was approved by admin user.

columns.Name: REJECTED_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds the date when the self-assigned life event was rejected by admin user.

columns.Name: INFO_REQD_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds the date when the self-assigned life event was returned recently by admin to the employee seeking additional information.

columns.Name: USER_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments provided by employee at the time of submitting the life event and also when providing additional information requested by admin during resubmission.

columns.Name: ADMIN_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments provided by admin user at the time of approving, rejecting or requesting additional information from employee.

columns.Name: ACTIONED_BY
columns.Comments: This column holds the name of admin user who recently actioned on the submitted life event such as approved, rejected or more info requested etc.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds foreign Key to HR_DOCUMENT_TYPES_F.

columns.Name: SYSTEM_DOCUMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column holds the system document type as set up in the life event approval rule for the life event submitted by employee.

columns.Name: DOR_ID
columns.Comments: The ID (Foreign key) of the Document of Record uploaded as supporting document for the submitted life event.

columns.Name: PTNL_LER_FOR_PER_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds foreign Key to BEN_PTNL_LER_FOR_PER.

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Whether the record was created from UI or other means.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
